title: Lawyer in Uttara Dhaka (2026) – Criminal, Divorce, Land & Corporate Legal Services
metaTitle: Lawyer in Uttara Dhaka 2026 – All Legal Services
metaDescription: Looking for a lawyer in Uttara Dhaka? Advocate Md. Shah Alam offers criminal, divorce, land, and corporate law services. Serving Uttara, Turag, Tongi & Gazipur.
heroIntro: Uttara is one of Dhaka's most rapidly growing residential and commercial hubs, home to thousands of families and businesses that regularly require expert legal services. Advocate Md. Shah Alam's chamber in Uttara, Dhaka provides comprehensive legal representation across criminal law, family law, property law, and corporate matters — all from a conveniently located office serving Uttara, Turag, Dakshinkhan, Airport area, Tongi, and Gazipur. This guide explains every legal service available and how to access them.

sections.h2: Why Choose a Lawyer Based in Uttara, Dhaka
sections.content:
When facing a legal matter, proximity to both your lawyer and the relevant courts matters enormously. Uttara is strategically situated in Dhaka North, giving it excellent access to:

  • The Dhaka Chief Metropolitan Magistrate (CMM) Court
  • The Dhaka Sessions Judge Court
  • The Dhaka Family Courts
  • The Bangladesh Supreme Court (High Court Division and Appellate Division) — accessible via the Dhaka expressway
  • The Sub-Registrar offices for Uttara, Turag, and Dakshinkhan for land registration

An Uttara-based lawyer eliminates the need to travel to Motijheel or old Dhaka for routine consultations and document submissions. This saves time, reduces costs, and ensures faster communication when urgent legal action is needed — such as bail applications, stay orders, or emergency injunctions.

Beyond geography, a locally based lawyer is familiar with the local police stations (Uttara West PS, Uttara East PS, Turag PS, Dakshinkhan PS, Airport PS), the tendencies of local courts, and the functioning of area Union Parishad offices — all of which are critical in practice.

Advocate Md. Shah Alam's Uttara chamber handles the full spectrum of criminal defence work under the Code of Criminal Procedure 1898, the Penal Code 1860, and special laws including the Digital Security Act 2018, Narcotics Control Act 1990, and the Women and Children Repression Prevention Act 2000.

Criminal Cases We Handle:

  • Bail Applications: Both bailable and non-bailable offences — anticipatory bail, regular bail, and bail hearings before the Sessions Court and High Court Division. We move quickly to secure bail for clients in custody.
  • FIR and GD Matters: Advising clients on how to file an FIR (First Information Report) or GD (General Diary), and defending clients wrongly named in FIRs.
  • Trial Defence: Representing accused persons before the Magistrate Court, Sessions Court, and Special Courts including the Women and Children Repression Prevention Tribunal and the Anti-Corruption Commission (ACC) Court.
  • Quashing of FIR: Filing writ petitions in the High Court Division to quash false or malicious FIRs under Article 102 of the Constitution of Bangladesh.
  • Police Harassment: Taking legal action against unlawful arrest, illegal detention, and police misconduct under Sections 220, 221, and 330 of the Penal Code 1860.
  • Cybercrime Defence: Defending clients facing charges under the Cyber Security Act 2023 or the Digital Security Act 2018 for alleged online defamation, hacking, or misuse of social media.

Speed matters in criminal cases. The chamber prioritises urgent matters — if you or a family member has been arrested or is facing criminal charges in Uttara or surrounding areas, contact the chamber immediately.

sections.h2: Family Law Services – Divorce, Custody & Maintenance
sections.content:
Family law matters are among the most sensitive legal issues a person faces. The Uttara chamber of Advocate Md. Shah Alam handles all family law cases before the Dhaka Family Courts with discretion, compassion, and legal expertise.

Family Law Services Include:

  • Divorce (All Types): Talaq notice drafting and serving under Section 7 of the Muslim Family Laws Ordinance 1961, khul petitions, mutual divorce deeds, and contested dissolution suits before the Family Court under the Family Courts Ordinance 1985.
  • Child Custody: Filing and defending child custody suits under the Guardians and Wards Act 1890. Applying for interim custody orders to protect the child's welfare during divorce proceedings.
  • Maintenance (Nafaqa): Filing maintenance suits for wives and children. Enforcing maintenance decrees when the husband or father fails to pay.
  • Mahr Recovery: Suing for unpaid or withheld mahr (dower) in the Family Court. The Kabinnama amount is legally enforceable as a debt.
  • Domestic Violence Protection: Applying for protection orders under the Domestic Violence (Prevention and Protection) Act 2010.
  • Court Marriage Registration: Coordinating with Kazi offices for nikah registration, preparing Kabinnama documents, and handling inter-faith or NRB marriages under the Special Marriage Act 1872.
  • Second Marriage (Polygamy): Advising on legal requirements under Section 6 of the Muslim Family Laws Ordinance 1961 for obtaining permission from the Arbitration Council before a second marriage.

To learn more, visit our Divorce Lawyer service page.

Land disputes are among the most common legal problems in Bangladesh. The chamber provides expert legal representation in all land and property matters governed by the Transfer of Property Act 1882, the Registration Act 1908, the State Acquisition and Tenancy Act 1950, and related laws.

Land Law Services Include:

  • Land Purchase Legal Due Diligence: Verifying title deeds, Khatian (RS, CS, SA, BRS), mutation (Namjari) records, and encumbrance certificates before purchasing land or a flat in Dhaka.
  • Deed Drafting and Registration: Preparing sale deeds, gift deeds (heba), power of attorney, and mortgage deeds for registration at the Sub-Registrar's office.
  • Mutation (Namjari) Applications: Filing and following up on mutation applications at the Union Parishad and District Commissioner office to transfer land records into the buyer's name after purchase.
  • Land Dispute Litigation: Representing clients in Title Suits, Declaration Suits, and Cancellation Suits before the Civil Courts under the Code of Civil Procedure 1908.
  • Stay Orders and Injunctions: Obtaining temporary and permanent injunctions to stop unauthorized construction, illegal possession, or forced eviction.
  • Partition Suits: Filing suits for partition of jointly owned property among co-owners or family members under the Partition Act 1893.
  • Khas Land Claims: Assisting landless persons and eligible beneficiaries in obtaining government khas land allotments from the District Commissioner.

Visit the Land Lawyer service page for more details.

Uttara is home to hundreds of businesses — from small enterprises to large corporate entities with offices near the Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport. The chamber assists entrepreneurs and corporations with all legal requirements under the Companies Act 1994, the Partnership Act 1932, the Bangladesh Labour Act 2006, and commercial laws.

Corporate Law Services Include:

  • Company Registration: Incorporating private limited companies, public limited companies, and one-person companies with the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms (RJSC).
  • Foreign Company Registration: Registering branch offices and liaison offices of foreign companies with the RJSC and the Bangladesh Investment Development Authority (BIDA).
  • Commercial Contract Drafting: Preparing and reviewing business contracts, agency agreements, franchise agreements, distribution agreements, and joint venture agreements.
  • Business Dispute Resolution: Representing companies in commercial litigation, arbitration, and mediation proceedings.
  • Labour and Employment Law: Advising on employment contracts, termination procedures, workplace disputes, and compliance with the Bangladesh Labour Act 2006.
  • Trademark Registration: Filing trademark applications with the Department of Patents, Designs and Trademarks (DPDT) under the Trademarks Act 2009.
  • Annual Compliance: Assisting companies with annual return filing, AGM requirements, and corporate governance compliance under the Companies Act 1994.

Visit the Corporate Lawyer service page for more.

sections.h2: Supreme Court and High Court Matters
sections.content:
For matters that require intervention of the Bangladesh Supreme Court — including constitutional writs, criminal revision, civil revision, appeals from subordinate courts, and bail from the High Court Division — Advocate Md. Shah Alam extends representation up to the highest courts in the country.

Supreme Court Services Include:

  • Writ Petitions: Filing writ petitions under Article 102 of the Constitution of Bangladesh for enforcement of fundamental rights, challenging unlawful government actions, and quashing illegal orders including FIRs and arrest warrants.
  • Bail from High Court: When bail is refused by lower courts for non-bailable offences, filing bail applications before the High Court Division under Section 498 of the Code of Criminal Procedure 1898.
  • Criminal Revision and Appeal: Challenging erroneous judgments of Sessions Courts and Magistrate Courts through the High Court Division.
  • Civil Appeals: Filing civil appeals from District Court judgments to the High Court Division and, in exceptional cases, to the Appellate Division.
  • Stay Orders from High Court: Obtaining Rule Nisi and interim stay orders from the High Court to halt enforcement of lower court orders pending hearing.

Visit the Supreme Court Lawyer service page for more information.

The chamber of Advocate Md. Shah Alam in Uttara, Dhaka serves clients from the following areas and police station jurisdictions:

Area Police Station Key Courts Nearby
Uttara (Sectors 1–14) Uttara West PS, Uttara East PS Dhaka CMM Court, Dhaka Sessions Court
Turag Turag PS Dhaka CMM Court
Dakshinkhan Dakshinkhan PS Dhaka CMM Court, Family Court
Airport Area Airport PS Dhaka Sessions Court
Tongi Tongi PS Gazipur District Court
Gazipur (Sadar, Kaliakoir, Kapasia) Gazipur Sadar PS, Joydebpur PS Gazipur District and Sessions Court
Mirpur Mirpur PS, Kafrul PS Dhaka CMM Court

The chamber's central Uttara location means clients from all of these areas can reach us within 15–30 minutes. For clients unable to visit in person, virtual consultation via phone or video call is also available.

sections.h2: Legal Fee Structure and Free Consultation
sections.content:
Transparency in legal fees is a core principle of the chamber. While exact fees depend on the nature, complexity, and duration of your case, the following gives a general guide to 2026 fee ranges:

Legal Service Approximate Fee Range (BDT)
Initial Consultation Free (first consultation)
Bail Application (Lower Court) Tk. 5,000 – 20,000
Bail from High Court Tk. 15,000 – 50,000
Criminal Trial (Magistrate Court) Tk. 15,000 – 60,000
Divorce (Talaq / Mutual) Tk. 5,000 – 25,000
Contested Divorce (Family Court) Tk. 25,000 – 80,000
Child Custody Suit Tk. 20,000 – 70,000
Land / Title Suit Tk. 20,000 – 1,00,000+
Company Registration (Private Ltd.) Tk. 15,000 – 40,000
Writ Petition (High Court) Tk. 25,000 – 80,000

All fees are agreed upfront and transparently before engagement. The chamber does not charge hidden fees. Payment plans may be available for clients facing financial hardship in serious criminal or family matters.

sections.h2: How to Book a Consultation with Advocate Md. Shah Alam
sections.content:
Booking a consultation with Advocate Md. Shah Alam at the Uttara chamber in Dhaka is simple and straightforward. The first consultation is free of charge — use this session to explain your legal situation, get a preliminary assessment of your options, and understand the likely costs and timeline.

How to Reach Us:

  • Location: Uttara, Dhaka (North Dhaka, near Sector 7/10/13 — contact for exact address)
  • Serving Areas: Uttara, Turag, Dakshinkhan, Airport, Tongi, Gazipur, Mirpur, and all of Dhaka
  • Online Contact: Fill in the contact form here to request a callback or appointment
  • Chamber Hours: Saturday to Thursday, 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM (closed Friday)
  • Emergency Matters: Bail and urgent criminal matters can be handled outside office hours — call the emergency line listed on the contact page

What to Bring to Your Consultation:

  • Your National ID Card
  • Any relevant documents (FIR copy, court notices, land deeds, Kabinnama, etc.)
  • A brief written summary of your situation (optional but helpful)
  • Questions you want answered

Whether your matter is urgent or you are planning ahead, getting legal advice early is always better than waiting until the situation escalates. Book your free consultation today.

faqs.question: Where is Advocate Md. Shah Alam's chamber located?
faqs.answer: Advocate Md. Shah Alam's chamber is located in Uttara, Dhaka — one of Dhaka's most accessible areas, well-connected to courts, police stations, and Sub-Registrar offices in North Dhaka. The chamber serves clients from Uttara, Turag, Dakshinkhan, Airport area, Tongi, Gazipur, and Mirpur. Contact us for the exact chamber address.

faqs.question: Is the first legal consultation free?
faqs.answer: Yes. The first consultation at Advocate Md. Shah Alam's Uttara chamber is free of charge. You can explain your legal situation, receive a preliminary assessment of your case, and understand your legal options without any financial commitment. To book, fill in the contact form on the website or call the chamber directly.

faqs.question: What types of criminal cases does the Uttara chamber handle?
faqs.answer: The chamber handles all types of criminal matters including bail applications (regular and anticipatory), FIR and GD matters, criminal trial defence, writ petitions to quash false FIRs, cybercrime cases under the Cyber Security Act 2023, narcotics cases, women and children repression cases, and High Court criminal revisions. Urgent bail applications are handled around the clock.

faqs.question: Can Advocate Md. Shah Alam handle cases in Gazipur courts?
faqs.answer: Yes. The chamber regularly handles cases in Gazipur District Court and Sessions Court in addition to Dhaka courts. The Uttara chamber's location makes it ideally positioned to serve clients from Tongi, Gazipur Sadar, Kaliakoir, and Kapasia without the need to travel to central Dhaka.

faqs.question: How much does a divorce lawyer cost in Uttara, Dhaka?
faqs.answer: At the Uttara chamber, lawyer fees for divorce matters typically range from Tk. 5,000 to 25,000 for a straightforward talaq or mutual divorce, and from Tk. 25,000 to 80,000 for a contested court divorce involving child custody or mahr disputes. Exact fees are discussed transparently during the free initial consultation.

faqs.question: Does the lawyer handle Supreme Court and High Court cases from Uttara?
faqs.answer: Yes. Advocate Md. Shah Alam handles Supreme Court matters including writ petitions, bail applications in the High Court Division, criminal revisions, civil appeals, and stay orders — all filed in the Bangladesh Supreme Court in Dhaka. Clients from Uttara, Gazipur, and surrounding areas do not need a separate Dhaka city lawyer for High Court matters.
